changelog.title: Corruption
changelog.log:
[Update] Now have option to set max level each toon on the list can go
[Note] There is global setting to, in case you want to set 1 max level for all toon on the list
[Note] Individual max level, this will overide global setting if set
[Note] When global setting and individual set to off, it will run until dead
[Update] Add option to run 5th (Defeat Monster entry)
[Note] It will pick the area randomly where it will afk killing mobs

changelog.title: Vault
changelog.log: [Update] Now can store all Epic Shard in vault or take them
